Before deepening into the Zone, it's necessary to traverse the old railroad embankment. The only safe passage there is guarded by the militaries. However, there's a small tunnel to the left, rookies usually go through it. There you'll be awaited by one of my debtors.
Respond to the call for help
Offer your help to the leader of the neutral squad.
Help the rookie from the Garbage

Duty: "Hello, the Duty faction is speaking from the Garbage. There's a wave of mutants going from the Dark Valley towards the bar. We guarantee our gratitude to all who will help kill off the scum. On the word of the Duty."
The quest to get through to the bar.
Learn something of Strelok from Siryi.

Bes: "The bandit scum is trying to gain control over the Garbage. There was a brawl here half an hour ago. We killed three of the freaks. The rest of the fellows retreated, but I have a feeling they'll be back any minute now with reinforcements. There are few of us and an extra barrell wouldn't hurt. If you help us destroy their reinforcements, then I'll return the favor."
There's been a shootout at the abandoned vehicle graveyard between neutral forces and bandits. The neutrals managed to fight the bandits off but are calling for help.
Wait until the snitch brings out his agent.
Report to Lukash about the mission.
Help the Duty faction eliminate Lukash
Return to the Duty farmstead and receive my fee
Help destroy the Monolith's strike squad
Find the cook in the Freedom base
Go to the Freedom base to see Skinflint and get a reward
Receive a reward for the destroyed bloodsuckers
Return to Skinflint for the artifact
Kill the bloodsuckers in the village
Report about the mission to the Duty squad
Report to Murk about the mission
Bring the Bulldog 6 to General Voronin
Get a flash drive from the crazy sniper.
Talk to Cap, the Freedom outpost commander
Lift the Bulldog 6 in the air if mission is complete, the TRs 301 in case of failure
Find the path to the Chornobyl NPP
Find the entrance to the sarcophagus
Meet whoever is behind the Monolith.
Find the secret lab and meet the "puppeteers".
Find out what is behind the door.
Escort Kruglov to the measurement site
Escort Semenov to the measurement site
Get out via the secret tunnel
Help! If anyone can hear me! The military got us pinned at the factory!
The pigs have got me cornered in the yard. Help!
Get the hell outta here, Marked One. You won't get past those army bastards without a fight. I told the Barkeep about you. He'll strike a deal with Duty, and they'll let you through.
Strelok, I have sad news. Fang died. Couldn't meet you. Too bad you went to the center on your own. It was your choice though. I know where to search for you, and whom to ask. Ghost.
The fight is off! The challenger got cold feet and didn't come out to fight at all!

Attention! Attention! A new fight is about to start in the Arena! In the left corner - the Zone's most dreaded nightmare, the ever-hungry Bloodsucker! And in the right corner... A man? Yes, it's a man! Your applause please for the Marked One!

Attention! Attention! A new fight is about to start in the Arena! In the left corner - the spoon-bending kung-fu master himself - the Burer! And in the right corner - the man constantly on the lookout! They call him the Marked One!
So, the challenger has been killed! Now there's a surprise!
Well, the challenger killed his opponent, but he didn't do it in time. He loses the fight!

Attention! Attention! A new fight is about to start in the Arena. In the left corner - it's white, it's fluffy and it's pissed off like hell... The Pseudodog! And in the right corner - he came from nowhere and that's precisely where he's headed. They call him the Marked One!

Attention! Attention! A new fight is about to start in the Arena. In the left corner - you know him, you love him, and he hates you right back! It's the Beast! And in the right corner - alive and kicking, at least for the moment - the Marked One!

Attention! Attention! A new fight is about to start in the Arena! In the left corner - the martial arts guru and health specialist - the Snork! And in the right corner - the man with no past and no future. They call him the Marked One!
The time's up! The challenger lost, but he's still fighting for his life!
Ho! The challenger killed his opponent in time! He wins!
Please, don't go, friend! Help us! The anarchists shot down our helicopter, and now they are coming to finish us off. We have wounded here! We need your help!
Ha! Where's your chopper now, government rats? Your time is up!
You've really done it this time, Wolfhound. A military chopper is on its way. They're gonna make mincemeat out of you!
Kruglov escaped! Find him! He couldn't have gone very far.
Help me, Marked One! They're killing me!!!
Keep on dreaming, dog! Go back to school before you start giving ultimatums.
Do not attack, or I will destroy the data. You'll get nothing!
If you don't want me to destroy the research materials, you better stay away!
Take your dogs, Wolfhound, and get outta here while you still can walk.
Enough talking. Let's do some killing!
Hey, come here, man! We can finish the government rats off together.
You bastard! You'll pay for setting us up. Don't you forget that, Marked One.
Are they following us?! Marked One, you must stop them!
I thought you scientists were supposed to be bright. I'm gonna make it real simple: either you give me the documents, or you leave here in a plastic bag.
I might not know Latin, Kruglov, but you wouldn't believe how fluent I am in violence. Would you like me to speak that to you, or are you going to give me the information I need?
You're a clever man, professor. Give me the information and you're free to go!

You just don't get it, do you, Kruglov? We shot down your stupid chopper and we need the information you are carrying. Give it to us and you can take your friends and get the hell outta here. It's your last chance. Hand me that flash drive and scram!
Get over here, quick! My boys caught a crazy stalker by the Red forest. We're trying to get some info out of him right now!
Marked One, you crazy?! Stop firing NOW! That's an order!
Stop firing NOW, Marked One! Do as I say or you're a dead man!
You're expelled from the group for breaking the Code, Marked One. You have no friends in Duty now.
Marked One, you disobeyed a direct order. Duty does not forgive things like this. You're dead meat.
Stop firing! No firing on Duty territory! Those who break the rules will be punished!
Attention! The Marked One has been declared a criminal for breaking the law and firing inside Duty territory.
Attention! There is a murderer on Duty territory. Find him and kill him!
You, stalker, help us! We were attacked by Mercs and half of our team were killed. Help us and I promise you won't regret it.
Help us fight through the ambush by the factory. I transferred the co-ordinates to you. Just be careful, Wolfhound and his cutthroats are by the helicopter.
The bandit base was attacked by the military. The entrance to the Garbage is blocked, but there is an old road to the South. You can use it, but you want to be careful. Good luck.
There will be no shooting unless I give the order. No itchy trigger fingers, understood?
Victory!!! Everyone, get over here. Come, Marked One. We need to talk.
Good, Marked One. Glad you're alive and decided to pay us a visit. Come over, and we'll have a chat. There's a little something coming up.
Excellent, your task is complete. Safe to say you've learned the basic skills.
Marked One, the way to the camp is now open to you. Come over and we'll talk.

A word about Strelok, Marked One. A stalker just came back from a long raid. Fox he's called. Looks like he had a pretty rough time and he's asking for help. Some weird beasts followed him all the way back, he says he won't hold out much longer. I reckon the fella will know a bit about Strelok. Here are the coordinates. You might wanna hurry up though.
Poor show, Marked One. The boys are dead, although that ain't exactly your fault. These things happen in the Zone. Anyway, you passed the test so get back here and we'll talk business.
Good job, Marked One. Keep it up and you'll make yourself a few friends. Pay me a visit and we'll talk business.
That wasn't very smart, Marked One. You passed the test but you're gonna have to deal with Wolf and his goons on your own now. Anyway, I'm waiting for you. We got more work to talk about.

Marked One, the military dug up some interesting stuff at the Ahroprom Research Institute. I'd like to get my hands on it and you probably would too. Get the info and take it to the barman at the stalkers' bar. Now get moving!
Watch out! You're right next to the anomalies. Use your bolts to work out their exact location and shape.

Press Contact ($$ACTION_CONTACTS$$). People within 250 meters of you who have turned their PDAs will become visible in Contacts and on your visor Minimap. You will also see their attitude towards you, so you can look out for potential enemies. However, bandits and mutants (har har) don't usually turn their PDAs on, so be careful!
string.text_c: Press Contact $$ACTION_CONTACTS$$. People within 250 meters of you who have turned their PDAs will become visible in Contacts and on your visor Minimap. You will also see their attitude towards you, so you can look out for potential enemies. However, bandits and mutants (har har) don't usually turn their PDAs on, so be careful!

string.text: To talk to someone, aim at them and press '$$ACTION_USE$$'.
string.text_c: To talk to someone, aim at them and press $$ACTION_USE$$.

string.text: Find the artifact in the area marked on the map and take it to the trader.
Pay attention, Marked One. Next time it could be you.
Marked One! Forget the artifact, you'll drop it off later. Get to the trailer by the road ASAP. My boys need help there. The idiots opened fire at a passing chopper. I've sent you the coordinates.
Search the bodies - you might find something useful.
You're rubbish, Marked One. Totally useless! Don't expect gratitude - there's nothing to thank you for!
Not bad, stalker! You certainly shot yourself some mutants, but you ain't all that quick on the draw, are you? If you wanna pass, you'll have to cough up some cash.
Excellent, Marked One, you really helped us out there. I say that's payment enough for your pass. Go on to the Bar.
Let them come closer so nobody can escape. I shoot first, you follow my lead.
You're on Duty territory, stalker. Fighting is not tolerated here.
Attention!! This is the Duty checkpoint. A horde of mutants is moving from the Dark Valley in the direction of the Bar. Anyone who helps us stop the monsters will not regret it.
You're on Duty territory, stalker. Start messing around and you'll be eating through a straw for the rest of your life.
Well done gents, we got 'em all. You lads take a little break now. You, stalker, come over here. Let's have a chat.

People, this is the commander of a neutral party. We pushed the bandits out from the abandoned vehicle park but they will probably try to retake it. We're low on numbers, so if you want to help, we'll save a spot for you.
You're approaching the Barrier. Don't even think about messing around. We'll be more than happy to accept any help though.
Marked One, get over here for your share and further instructions
Marked One, go back to your position
If you spend the whole night at the Tower in the village something is GUARANTEED to happen...
Don't forget the mines! One mistake and you're toast...
Be careful, Marked One. Apparently there's a new anomaly in the village. The bastard's fast and invisible!

Attention all those wishing to liquefy their brains: the road to the Red forest is protected by a Monolith unit and as you probably know those guys shoot first and don't ask questions later. Good luck.
Our job here is done. Retreat to the farmstead. We will sort out the payment there.
Forward boys! The way is clear!
Marked One, take down those snipers!
Be careful, Marked One, or you'll catch a bullet...

Marked One!? You're alive!? Great! So you managed to turn off the Scorcher, eh? Everyone is trying to get to the center of the Zone through Prypiat. Nobody knows what's there...maybe a treasure trove of artifacts or maybe something that makes all wishes come true.\n There's a party of veterans preparing to go there right now. If you hurry up you just might make it in time to join them. I'll let them know you're coming so they wait for you.
Teams one and two - check the first floor, team three - main hall, four and five - check the second floor
To turn the machine off, press ($$ACTION_USE$$)
string.text_c: To turn the machine off, press $$ACTION_USE$$

string.text: You made it after all, stalker. You turned out to be much stronger than we initially thought. Well, the time for us to talk has come. Head towards the signal. We'll be waiting for you.
What happened? Is he dead? Come back immediately!
What happened? Is he dead? Take the samples and come back immediately!
To turn the miracle machine off press ($$ACTION_USE$$)
string.text_c: To turn the miracle machine off press $$ACTION_USE$$

string.text: Good man, Marked One, you made it after all. It's extremely important that we study the machine in the lab. Try turning it off so that we can have a look at it.

Listen, this prototype won't protect you from powerful emissions for long. I expected this, so every time an emission is detected, a timer is activated. When the time runs out, the prototype will no longer protect you, so be careful and keep an eye on the time.

Great work, Marked One. The emission has been turned off and you're still alive. I need to warn you, however. We called in a couple of military helicopters to clear the area of zombies. You would be advised not to wander around unless you have to. Oh, and by the way, pop into our bunker every once in a while, won't you?
Finish the game on Novice difficulty.
Finish the game on Stalker difficulty.
Finish the game on Veteran or Master difficulty.
You have seen the Monolith, but did not succumb to the call.
Do not think too much, act!
Do not allow bandits to defeat Bes and his men.
You found Strelok's stash, the search continues.
You managed to save professor Kruglov and did not let the Zone extinguish his light.
The venture to Yantar was worthy. Your brain is protected now!
You found the Ghost suit and honored his legacy.
The guide has shown you where to go.
Find Doctor who will tell you the truth.
Decoder opened the secret Sarcophagus doors for you.
I'm all but certain it was...
Meet Sidorovich for the last time.
Choose your side in this conflict.
This village gave you shelter, and you have not forgotten this.
The worst stalker in the Zone
The Zone has no place for empathy. Tolik has learned it the hard way.
You helped Tolik and saved him. Who knows, maybe someone will show mercy to you?
You've saved Yurik and proven that the Zone is not a place where the strongest rule.
No doors can stand between you and your goal. Even ones that lead nowhere.
Find each common and rare artifact in the Zone.
Tourist suit is yours. Now you can go for a walk and enjoy nearby anomalies.
Become the owner of unique Walker 9 x 18 pistol.
Threaded SPSA-14 is yours. To scare and protect!
Kill each mutant at least once.
I'm done with drinking for good
You have drunk 25 bottles of Cossacks. Hope the time was well-spent.
The last mammoth in the Zone
Equip all beach-themed artifacts. And do not forget the lights!
One has entered the Zone and took everything.
We'll see, punk… If this hideout story is a lie, you're dead meat… I'm gonna roast you on open fire…
But it's true… I swear… this is no joking matter…
He's been gone for quite a while now!
Well, he may have been stopped by a patrol or something…
Man, if you lied to us, you'll be wishing you were dead!
I didn't lie to you, honest…
I'm so itching to take you out!
But I've told you the whole truth! I know this is serious…
You listen to me, if you've set our pal up, I'm gonna waist you!…
Guys, I'm sending someone your way, so wing it. You may attack, if necessary. Over.
Alright, Wolf, send him in. As long as he stays out of the way. Out.
Pipe down man. Let me fill you in.
Wolf, factory cleared. Returning to starting positions. Out.
Hey! Anybody alive?! Do I still have to sit here? Can I get out of here?
Halloo!! You guys still alive? What the heck is going on?
Stalkers, I'm right here… Help me!
Man, what a day… Damn, is somebody going to save me or what?!
I owe you, brother. I could never thank you enough.
Attention. You are approaching the secured perimeter of an ecological disaster zone! Illicit crossing of the perimeter is a criminal act.
Any attempt to penetrate the secured zone will be punished by any means necessary. Patrols have the right to shoot on sight.
The Zone poses mortal danger! We are here to protect you from the Zone, not the Zone from you. Do not jeopardize your life, do not try to penetrate into the secured area!

The Security Service of Ukraine is calling all right-minded and loyal citizens to collaborate with the authorities. Report all known cases of stalking! Do not let the looters hide behind your backs! They bring radioactive, unidentified items from the Zone that are highly dangerous for human life and health! Only with your help can we eliminate this hideous phenonemon! Do not put your lives and the lives of your families at risk for the sake of dubious profit.
I might as well warn you. I'm having a crappy day, as always. No booze. I expect everyone to do their job right. Otherwise heads will roll.
Just warning you. Today is even worse then yesterday. The booze I found yesterday is gone and I have nothing left to drink. Some heads are bound to roll today.
Listen all… Today's been the shittiest day of my crappy life. I'm not even going to warn you, you know it all by heart anyway.
I haven't felt this bad for a whole week. Beware, everyone.
What a shit day. If I hear just one sound from you, I'll gun you down, you hear me?
Holy Moly, just think how many commanders have popped off so far, eh? Three, six, or was it ten already? Is anybody even counting?
What was I saying, hic… Bring him to me right now, or you'll regret it, you bums!
Who's making a racket around there? I'm on my way, I'm on my way! I'm gonna rip your heads off!
Shit! Everywhere you look - is shit. Shit and idiots!
What are you staring at, want me to rip off your head?
Have you gone crazy over there or what?
Who's banging about there, eh? Lemme come down and give you a good hammering.
Oh crap… I'm a sitting duck here… And just what am I waiting for, eh? Oh well…
Turn this stinking thing off! My head's gonna explode.
Hic… eh… Went down well, this one…
What are you standing there for, stalker? If you want to go through, come up and we'll have a chat. If not - I suggest you take off before we get angry.
Thank you, Marked One. You're ok, you know that? I'll be sure to tell everyone at the camp that you helped me out.
Help me, brother! Take the medkit off the stiff, I can't reach it.
Help me, brother! Take the medkit off the stiff, I can't crawl that far.
The choice is yours. Either I brainwash you like I usually do with all the rookies or I treat you like a real stalker and give you a mission straight away.

Got a job for you, Marked One… I want you to find a stalker called Nimble, he was carrying some very important information. He disappeared somewhere near the bridge. Find him, dead or alive - I don't care, I need the flash drive with the info. Visit Wolf from the local camp, and ask him. He certainly knows where that guy can be.
Listen, Marked One… I've done some thinking, and here's what I'd like to offer… Generally speaking, what you really need is to find Strelok. Right?

Anyway, here's the thing about Strelok. There's a stalker that goes by this name. They say he's found a path to the northern reaches of the Zone. And that is a virgin area, a real goldmine for artifacts… Yeah… Anyway, I can help you find him… However… As you can imagine, it won't be a free ride. You'll have to work it off… But in the long run we will both benefit: You're going to waste that Strelok fella and find out what's happened to you… And I'll find… well, I mean… I'll get my share of our mutual profit, he-he… So what do you say? Deal?

Alright, listen… You mean business, I can see that… And I… I mean, we need guys like you. We're doing sort of an investigation with some other traders. We want to open up the path to the North, to the center of the Zone. And near the center someone or something is trying to hamper our progress… How the heck this Strelok managed to sneak through, I don't know… You see, there's this one area where your brain starts boiling. An eerie place… Anyway, to cut a long story short - a couple of guys have been spying on them grunts for me, not far from here. Apparently, the ones at the Ahroprom Research Institute, have dug up something. Something major. I'm positive it has something to do with the center of the Zone. Anyway, whatever they've dug up, it's secured somewhere on the third floor of the Institute. And we really need this stuff. You see what I mean?
Once you have the briefcase, don't bring it here. Take it straight to the Barman. He runs the stalker bar, the 100 Rads, I'll upload the coordinates and all the data you need to your PDA. Clear?

You'll have to go North through the Garbage, then turn West. You'll end up at the Ahroprom Research Institute after a few kilometers. And be careful, the radiation level is way too high at the Garbage. So I suggest you cough up for some antirad or vodka. Well, good luck.

So, Marked One, I saved you and I'm not going to pretend I did it to win favors upstairs. You do some jobs for me and we're even. Besides, keeping you busy might be a good way to deal with your amnesia. And I'll try to find out what I can about your problem. I don't give a shit about why you need to find this Strelok guy. I mind my own business. If you want to kill him, well, you must have your reasons.
Go on, get out of my sight.
Don't just stand there like a idiot. Give me what you've got and scram!
Did you doze off or something?
Not bad, some pretty good stuff you've got there.
Alright. Well, drop by if you get any more.
That's my boy. You've made my day.
Now that's the way to go.
Man, dog food is more valuable than this.
What the heck are you bringing in all this crap for?
Did I not make myself clear? I need real stuff.
Marked One, the bandit base was attacked by the military. The entrance to the Garbage is blocked, but there is an old road to the South. You can use it, but you want to be careful. Good luck.
Hey, man, COME UP HERE! Help us grab our buddy from these bastards!
Irregular situation. Secure immediately. First floor. Second floor. Main hall. Eliminate the trespassers. Suppress the intrusion.
Teams one and two check the first floor, Team three - the main hall, teams four and five - second floor.
Emergency. Not enough power to maintain operative status.
What you want is here stalker, come
Your path ends here, come to me.
Whatever you wish, it will be granted. Come to me!
The time has come, I see your wish.
The path has ended, human, come to me.
Come to me. You will gain what you deserve.
Attention. Power units damaged. Installation power level falling.
Attention. Installation power depleted to critical level.
Monolith standby power circuit activated. Monolith power supply switched to C-Consciousness lab.
…You've actually made it, stalker. You've proven much stronger than we thought at first. Well, it's high time we had a chat. Follow the signal, we'll be waiting for you.

Marked One!? Alive!? Great! You've actually managed to deactivate the Brain Scorcher! Everyone almost got mad here when they found out. All who could rushed to break through to the center of the Zone: lone stalkers, Freedom, Duty, even the mercenaries. The first one who makes it will have it all! Wish Granter, goldmine of artifacts and a hell knows what else. Hurry up, if the Granter is really in the sarcophagus of the station, the first who gets there will be granted a wish. A squad of veterans is gathering before Prypiat at this moment. You can go with them if you make haste.
Base, this is 056. Absence of radiation confirmed. No large enemy groups detected. Scrofa landed in the antennae area for reconnaissance. Standing by for further instructions. Over.
065, this is base. Return home. Scrofa, report.
Base, this is Scrofa, minimum resistance. Someone has been here before us.
Scrofa, implement quarantine procedures in the antennae area. Eliminate quarantine violators on sight.
Marked One, follow your instincts. Good luck to you.
Alright, according to the map, we've got to turn right - there's a safe underground passage.
Take cover! They're in the windows!
Eat this, you son of a bitch!
Freaks on the roof to the left!
Two on the roof to the right!
One on the roof to the right!
To the right, behind the pipes!
Marked One, come here, we need to talk.

Gentlemen, listen closely. We're going to push forward to the station. The town is swarming with Monolith bastards and other scum, so keep your eyes opened and cover your backs. That's it. Check your guns. We'll advance along the lane. Standby 15 seconds.
You must be the Marked One, Barkeep spoke of you. Let's try and break through together. I know the path to the station.
We're moving, boys. Look sharp. The Monolith guys are all around.
Look who's here, the grunts! Trying to get first to the center, to skim all the cream. Guess what, we're soon going to be there too. Move it, guys!
No more flying for these birdies.
Underground car park. We must be right in the center of Prypiat. Keep quiet! Monolith's headquarters are close by. Move on, we're about to make it to the station.
Fall back, fall back! There's too many of them! Retreat!
That was a bit of a mauling.
Marked One, come here, we need to talk.
Hey, guys, what's with you? I'm a friend!
Wolfhound, we've got visitors. Some stalker is coming right at us… What do we do?
Wolfhound, I didn't get it. Did he knock off our snipers all by himself?
I see Kruglov at the construction site! Let's go get him!

Marked One, there's a Burner anomaly ahead in the tunnel. We'd better split up and go one by one, that'll give us a better chance to survive. You go first and when I see that you've reached the end of the tunnel, I'll follow. Beware of the fire traps and look out for hot air distortions.
Stalker, I'm begging you! We were returning from Yantar when the Mercs shot down our helicopter. I heard that they are looking for information but I know they'll kill us.
Whatever you say, Marked One. But you go first, and I'll follow you. I'm a third-rate fighter, so you'd better feel the ground yourself.
We're safe, finally! Thank you for your help. I owe you one, so here, take this flash drive. These are the results of our last expedition. I'm sure Barkeep will pay you well for this stuff.
If you come to our mobile lab in Yantar, we'll give you a real scientist's suit.
Hurry up before anyone gets here.
You, stalker, help us! We were attacked by Mercs and half of our team was killed. Help us and I promise you won't regret it.
…you watch out, there are about 15 of them… we don't know for sure.
Help us break through the ambush by the plant, I've uploaded the coordinates. Watch out, Wolfhound and his cutthroats are by the chopper.
They're following us! Marked one, stop them!
Marked One, Marked One, stop them! They'll kill us all!!
He's right below us! Shoot through the floor!!!
Wolfhound, let's get to it! The Duty are not going to sit around and wait for ever. They'll be sure to come and help Kruglov.
But we've got almost no time left.
Alright, attack right after we kill the guards.
The professor took off! Get Kruglov! He couldn't have gone too far!
…there's a stalker closing in on you. Looks like he's gunned down all our snipers. Watch out, he's coming from the bar!
Yes. Send a couple of guys to cover your asses.
Don't you know what to do with witnesses?! Finish him! And make no fuss.
…what's going on there? What's all this shooting? Can you hear me?
…RESPOND, DAMN IT!!! WHAT IS GOING ON?!
Wait! I don't want to waste some of my own. Destroy the chopper security squad, and we'll proceed afterwards.
Get going! We'll make it! We've got to make it!
Fang, we can't just leave him like that.
Just leave him, there's nothing we can do for him. The blowout is minutes away, we won't get through with him.
No, Fang, I'm not leaving him…

Where the hell are you, Strelok?… Damn! And Doc's gone… I could really do with their help right now… When I get back from the mission I'm gonna find the Guide at the Perimeter… He goes there a lot… And he may help me find Doc. And if Strelok's still alive, Doc will know for sure where to find him… Anyway, that's for later… And now I'm all alone. On this stinking underground mission. Vasiliev doesn't count, he's just a burden, which I'll have to protect…

Vasiliev lost it at the very last moment, and when the door opened, he ran off instead of deactivating the lower consoles. I shouldn't have relied on him. Strelok was right to mistrust those lying dogs. My only chance is to get to the door before the controller…
It's too dangerous outside, you go first. Check the area outside the lab. The monsters have been very active lately.
Wait a minute. Let me take the measurements and we'll head back.
…ok… ok… what the heck?! What the hell is going on here?!!!
Marked One, we have a problem!
Wait, wait… ok, now, let me see… WHAT?!
SHIT!!! IMMINENT BLOWOUT! RUN, MARKED ONE!!! HELL'S ABOUT TO BREAK LOOSE! AAAAAAAAAAAAAAGH!!!
Oohhh. We've got to get out of here quick.
I've got the measurements, now we just need to get back to the bunker.
Here are the results. Here, here and here. Couldn't be any more accurate.
Ok, ok, a little off scale, but the radiation is normal. We need to move on.
Good job, guys, take your positions.
Everybody take your stand. Let them come close. They will be easier targets.
Move on, boys, let's open a can of whoop-ass on these bastards!
Great job, boys, we wiped them out. Everybody have some rest. And you, stalker, come over here, let's have a chat.

People, this is the commander of the neutral squad. We've kicked the bandits out of the derelict machinery scrapyard. Expecting counter attack. We're low on numbers, so everyone's welcome to give us a helping hand.
Buzz off stalker. We don't let every loser go through.
Attention everyone, this is Duty outpost at the Garbage. A horde of mutants is advancing from the Dark Valley towards the bar. Whoever helps us push back the scum won't regret it. Duty word.
Stalker, you're on Duty territory. Any attempt to attack our people will be severely punished.
You're an idiot, Marked One. Totally useless! Don't expect gratitude - there's nothing to thank you for!
A pretty good job you did there, stalker, shooting those mutants. Nothing spectacular, however, so if you want to go through you'll have to pay.
Excellent, Marked One, you really helped us out there. I say that's payment enough for your pass. Go on to the Bar.
To anyone who can hear me: we've been attacked by a gang of bandits. We need help! Brothers, help us, we're in deep shit. Bandits have gone mad. Is there anyone nearby, damn it? We're dead meat!
Help us fight off this scum first, brother. We'll talk later.
You'll be shitting through your nose, punk!
Come out you piece of shit!
Piss off, you stinking hero wannabe!
Just mind your own business, stalker.
Your cash and your artifacts. And quick, you asshole!
Hand it over or we'll blow your head off!
I've got no money, no artifacts!
I don't have anything, don't shoot!
Thanks, friend, I owe you one!
Help! Need help! I'm in trouble!
Guys! Whoever can hear me, help! These scumbags are slaughtering us stalkers!
The pigs got me cornered in the yard! Help me out, brothers!
Thank you, friend. You saved my life. That was too close. The grunts always carry their missions through. We've got to get out of here before the taskforce arrives. C'mon, I'll show you the way.
Fire on his position! Don't let him get away!
Come out, you punk! The taskforce are on their way!
Marked One! I've told Barkeep about you. He should talk to Duty guys to let you through. I suggest you go and see him, fast.
…What should I do?… What should I do!?
…this stinking Zone… bastards… using us to fill every gap… hate them…
… I want to go home… home…
…you're the only person who can go, you've got to understand. It's highly important that we do the measurements now.
I don't give a shit, I'm not going anywhere alone.
I'm begging you, please, do it. We all depend on it.
Wow, Marked One! It's about time you got through to us.
Thank you, Marked One, for rescuing Kruglov. Take this pressurized suit as a reward for your troubles. Also, I suspect you didn't come here for a simple reward, am I right?

We have been studying the emission in Lab X16 for a long time, but you won't get in there without special equipment. We've developed a psi-protection device that can help shield you from the emission, but needs some fine-tuning. If you could help us with that, I could give you a working prototype that you can use to get inside the laboratory.
Yes, we know about the laboratory, but we don't have the exact coordinates. Besides, trying to get into it would be way too dangerous.
What happened? Is he dead? Come back immediately!
Alright, let me adjust the prototype…
You did an excellent job. If the measurements are correct, the prototype should provide you with maximum protection from emission.
What happened? Is he dead? Take the samples and come back immediately!
Great job, Marked One, you've actually made it to the lab. It is vital that we study the installation in the lab. Try do deactivate it so we can examine it properly.

Vasiliev was working on the lab issue. About a week ago he and a stalker called Ghost tried to get inside. A couple of hours later we felt a major tremor, and after another hour we picked up a signal from Vasiliev coming from the swamp, but it died away. And Vasiliev died away with it, it would seem. Try to find his corpse. He had the exact information on the lab and the way to get into it. There may even be info on deactivating that source of the emission. I've uploaded you all the data we have.
… we've got all the papers, we know how to deactivate the source of the emission. Proceeding to dig into the lab with Ghost. Zombies coming out of everywhere…
…It's all screwed up. Ghost has gone insane, he must have been affected by the emission. I've dropped everything, trying to get out through the tunnels…
…I'm at the swamp, but where's the bunker? Shit, shit, shit! I can't make out my whereabouts! No response from Sakharov. What's going on? Zombies everywhere, I'm running out of ammo…
Attention! Bio-unit 12-01 power supply console code locked. Report to security officer. Unlock operating units. Unlock operating units. Unlock operating units.
Unit C12 unlocked. Report to security officer.
Unit C17 unlocked. Report to security officer.
Unit C23 unlocked. Report to security officer.
Hmm, the detector seems to have gone off-scale. Marked One, we need to get deeper inside, I can't make out anything in here.
Wait a minute. Let me do the metering and we'll move on.

Listen, the prototype can't protect you from the strong emission forever. I've provided for this: when you get hit by a strong field, the timer will start ticking. As soon as the time runs out, the prototype will stop protecting you. So take care, and remember about the timer.

Great work Marked One. The emission has been deactivated and you're still alive. I need to warn you however. We called in a couple of military helicopters to clear the area of zombies. You would be advised not to wander around unless you have to. Oh, and by the way, drop by our bunker every once in a while, won't you?
Blowout, chief! Get the heck out of here!
Ground! Find cover, Blowout, we're gone!
Alert! Blowout! Disperse and take cover!
Look at this shit… The unit is off scale, chief!
Let's find a nice, comfy hole…
Chief, we'll get freaking roasted! We need decent cover!
Yastreb, roger! Emergency, Sapsan! Everyone fire on entrance!
Alright, all clear! Sapsan-six, cover me! Ok, move, move, move!
Don't stand there like a fool, come closer, let's have a little talk.
Got what they deserved, stinking anarchists!
Hey-hey-hey! Halt, stalker! You're on Freedom territory!
What are you staring at, scumbag? Don't you worry, I'm gonna get you sooner or later…
Move on, folks, the way is clear
Hey, stalker! I've got a job for a good shooter! Come up if interested! Or piss off!
Halt! Regular check-up! Don't shit your pants.
Halt, dammit! Want to get shot or something?
Everybody halt!!! And no ramping around here!!!
Boys all buckled up, blast off in a second.
Lukash really had it coming. I always knew he was a sissy.
Stay away or I'll whack you!
I'm insane, I belong in a asylum.
Surrender, I burn in hell first.
And at the base the men are drinking vodka…
Check your guns and ammo, just in case.
Man, did we kick some military ass!
I was just starting to warm up.
And we only outnumbered them by one…
Ok, folks, time to go home and celebrate.
Quiet! Spread out and follow me! Let's smoke the rats out of there!
Men, we got a job to do. All - to the gathering point!
Come up here, let's have a little chat.
Well sure, no one's ever watching the rear except Kolyan!
Kolyan! You and your squad will try and cut behind them.
Alright, Tolik! Take Baldy and Squint… Cover the right flank
Death to the enemy! Let's get 'em!
It's about time we got to whack someone!
Are we going to shoot any sweethearts this time? Heheee…
Just why does it always happen at the wrong time? Eh!
Just don't shit yourselves! Ha ha ha!
Look at that! Fresh cannon fodder!… Just kidding!
It's about time we got some exercise! Eh… Not much to do but drink vodka these days.
Where is that son of a bitch hiding?
Come out, mutant! We're not gonna hurt ya! He-hee…
You! Freak of nature! Reveal yourself!!
We have a problem at the farmstead. Get the boys.
Well, get to it, stalker. You owe me.
Shit, it's an ambush!!! Traitor! Get out!!! Quick!
No tail, I'm a snot-faced rookie or something…
Well, Pavlusha, what have you got this time?
The info is solid. Here's the folder.
I think I'm gonna take a leak…
Number one, see two targets, sniper on the roof, shooter in the window.
Number two, get three, four, and five and move left, around the barracks. The rest follow me.
Number three, watch the towers. Four, five, cover me.
Five?! Five?! Shit, number five down…
One's down, this is number two. Assuming command.
They killed Slavka! Bastards!!! Bastards!! Bastards!!!
Number seven, get a grip on yourself!
Chief! We've got to get out of here! There are more of them than we thought!
Stay calm! Proceed with the mission!
Right of the fireplace! Behind the crate! He's yours, four! Bandit down!
Approaching the house. Six, cover, everyone follow me!
Watch out, number one! There's a watcher on the tower!
Target neutralized! Mission complete! Fall back! Everyone! Fall back!
Three wearing exoskeletons straight ahead! Unit five! Blast away at the barrels!
One! Passed the yard! Going toward you! Over! Number two, roger.
Entering the building! Eight, check the staircase! Got one son of a bitch!
Look at these dumbasses… Man, I can’t watch this without cringing…damn!
Guys, attack on the count of 5! 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, fire!
Hey, Marked One! Get your ass over here, we need to talk!
Take up your positions! Let’s wait for the enemy, stay alert!
YEAAAH!!! If you’re still alive – on me. Marked One, get over here, we need to talk
Come over here, we need to talk!
Don’t just stand there, get over here. I’ll pay you for helping Tolik!
I’ve got a pack of dogs on my tail, help me deal with them and then I can answer all your questions!
Whew, we're done with those mutants!
Keep close together, don't scatter like cockroaches
Men, Wolf here sent us some support along with the order to attack. Time to move on and be heroes!
Move on, charge! Hammer those bastards!
Hey, Marked One! It's great to see you're alive and even had time to drop by! Come inside, there's something interesting coming up that I wanna talk to you about
Come over here, let me tell you about the situation
What are you standing there for? Come closer, I don't bite.
Where you going without a weapon, retard?
Hey, come over here, I'll give you a few things
Well, get some fresh air and come inside

OK, so I learned a few things about Strelok. He was a stalker. They say he found a way to the Northern part of the zone. I'd love to know how he got there, 'cause those parts are virgin and rich in artifacts… Anyway, me and other traders will help you find him, and then maybe you'll find that hidden path. It'll be good for all of us - you'll finish Strelok and we'll explore the way up North. It sure is risky as hell, but as they say, no pain - no gain!

So, Marked One, regarding Strelok… A stalker by the name of Fox is coming back from a raid. Looks like he had a rough time and needs help. He came back with sometype of critters all over him, he says he won't last long. He just might know something about Strelok - you gotta see him right now. Here are his coordinates…

Just think about it, dude, next time it could be you in its place! He-he. Anyhow, be extremely careful near anomalies! As soon as you hear the detector beeping, grab the bolts and toss them in front of you. All rightie, talk to you!

Yeah, Marked One, don't forget to use the binoculars. They will help you see enemies before they see you. And also avoid getting deep in shit. It's got a built-in target indicator. The highlighting colors match those on the visor. Red is the enemy, yellow means a neutral, and green is a friend. That's it - good luck!
This is your personal PDA. This useful device will help you survive in the Zone. And if you do die, others will know where and how. He-he. Just kidding. Here, let me remind you how to use it.
Your tasks can be found in the first section of the PDA.
Most tasks have buttons which allow you to access additional information on the task.
Remember, each new task is automatically shown on your minimap.
So if you’re not interested in that task you should switch to the previous one. There is also a separate section for your own tasks and notes on the map…
Moving on… The second section on the PDA is the map
Buttons above the map allow you to zoom in and out…
Ehm… Oh, you can also center the map on yourself… And… What else?
You can add or remove your own notes from the map…
I’m sure you’ll work it out, it’s not very complicated… The PDA also has a Contacts section

The Contacts section contains a list of stalkers within 50 meters of you. You can see a brief description, rank, group allegiance and probable attitude towards you here… Remember that while you’re neutral, the way other stalkers feel towards you depends on you alone. Note how someone’s attitude towards you changes when you help them.

Be careful if enemies are around. They’re marked red on the visor. Friends are green and neutrals are yellow. Oh, and PDAs of dead stalkers are grey… Helps if you're into looting corpses… What else? Oh yeah… There’s the diary, too.
Well… what is there to say about it? All the information you need is noted in your journal… And news too… Even what I am telling you now can be found in this section… Then there’s a Rating section

You can see the top twenty stalkers I know. I refresh this info from time to time to keep up the competitive spirit… Ha-ha… Maybe you’ll be at the top of this list some day… Who knows? Your own achievements are noted in the Stats section
It’s pretty much self-explanatory… Then we have the Encyclopaedia
It contains information about the Zone and survival advice which you find or are given by other stalkers. That’s basically it, I think…

Oh, one more thing… Your PDA model has a wide-frequency radio wave scanner with an inbuilt decoder. Its radius of operation is about 400 meters so you can even intercept military comms. Mine has a working radius of 30 km so I can always get in touch with you. I’ll give you tasks and the latest news… Initially, I’ll give you advice too… Is everything clear? Or should I repeat?
First off, switch your PDA on and listen carefully because I don’t like to repeat myself.
Come on, switch on your PDA. Have you forgotten how to do it? Don’t piss me off.
Turn it on, c'mon! What are you waiting for?
We'll talk after you finish the mission!
Get to your mission, stop wasting time!
You’re not a zombie are you? You’re weird, that’s for sure.
Bullet! Thanks, friend. Hell, I already kissed my life goodbye!
Guys, help me out! I'm gonna get crushed real soon!
No, I won't jump there even if you shoot me!
Dude, come over here, I've got something for you!
Ah, damn it! Argh… may you rest in peace, brother…
Feeling all right? Then we're going back to the base for help!
Talk, you son of a bitch, or watch my bullet blow your brains out!!
Follow me, I know a good place for an ambush! I'll thank you for your help! At Duty we pay our debts!
Thank this stalker, he's the one who helped me.
OK, scum, you can live! Just don't let me see you ever again!
Hide on the other side of the road. They'll be here soon! Open fire only after I do!
They're coming… and here we go…
Hey, Marked One! Have you brought the documents from the Institute?

OK, the documents you brought from the Institute make some things a little clearer but we’re still missing the info we need to get a full picture. A lab designated X18 is mentioned and its description matches the abandoned underground vaults in the Dark Valley. Looks like you’ll have to go there and get the info we need. The lab is closed and you’ll need two electronic keys to get inside. I’ll give you one but you’ll have to get the other one from Boar in the Dark Valley.

Great work, Marked One! We have the documents at last. I need to have a look at them now and maybe I’ll work out how to get North. While I do that, if you have problems with money, you can fight at the Arena. The owner of the Arena is Arni, I've uploaded his coordinates.

All you have to do is acquire the second key to Lab X18, get inside and retrieve the second batch of documents. Don’t forget to get yourself a protective suit or you won’t have a chance in hell of getting to the lab. So, will you do it?
So, Marked One, you got the documents from X16?
So, Marked One, you brought the documents from X18?
All you gotta do is get inside the bunker below the antennae and switch them off. You in?

Good, the situation is becoming clearer. As I expected this Brain Scorcher is man-made. It’s a Kaymanov experimental emitter and its components were made exactly in X18. These documents refer to lab X16 where they sent some components. According to this, X16 is located in the production complex area by Lake Yantar. The scientists have set up a mobile lab around there so maybe they can help.

OK, Marked One, you’ve got the protective prototype so you’ll be safe from the emissions. I have the bunker coordinates. Don’t forget that the prototype won’t protect you forever, so you need to get to the bunker ASAP and turn off the Burner. I don’t know what will happen after that but I am sure it will be worth it. The only thing we can be sure of is that the road to the Zone’s center will be open.
It ain’t simple – you need to get to the scientists and find out where X16 is so you can get the missing documents. So, you up for it?
Base, this is 034, we're right above the target!
032, drop your men onto the roof, do you read me?
032, roger, on the roof it is!
034 here, landed, all clear, the group is off, covering!
Base, Barsuk is on the spot, hit the objective!
032, I'm over the roof, can't land, gonna drop them off in the air!
This is 032, the group is off!
Base, Mangust has landed, let's start the action!
Excellent! I am glad you have been granted level 2 access. You’ll find out what our lab actually does now! Your access code is 1243

Dear colleague, let me remind you that you will be servicing the tanks in the central laboratory starting tomorrow. You must inspect them every 2 hours. Make your reports directly to me. The code to the central laboratory is 9524
It's too dangerous outside, you go first. Check the area outside the lab. The monsters have been very active lately.

Listen to me carefully, sucker! Have you heard the story of Robin Good? What about George the Fair? Well, your money went to feed the poor. Forget about it. Try sticking your nose here again and you'll be crawling back to your mommy!
Piss off while you're still alive!
Hey, bro, come over, I've got something for you!
Dude, get over here, we need to talk!
Yo, hombre, come over here and let's talk business!
Yo, hombre, come over here and let's talk business!

Stalker Marked One! You have entered Duty territory on behalf of Barkeep! We let you pass because we respect him. But don't forget that you are near our base. Any attempt to attack our people will be brutally terminated.
Mate, we'll chat all right, after the fight is over!
please, please don’t kill me! Your partner is being taken to the abandoned factory, that’s all I know, I swear!
Death solves all problems - no man, no problem. We’ll tell Boar that we delivered the prisoner as requested
He’s really pissing me off, man! This is the third time in a week!
Shh…did you hear that? Man, I have a bad feeling about this… I don’t want to leave the camp…
Thank you, friend, come over so I can reward you!
Come over, let's have a chat and take care of your reward! I don't like to owe people!
Oh, man…how could this happen? How could this happen??! Damn it, everything is going wrong again. Now we'll have to call for more people… We've got enough problems as it is… Damn…

Stalker, now you will be able to break through to the laboratory, but unless you turn off the emitter, you won't last long even with the psi-protection on. We've estimated an approximate location of the emitter; it is located in an underground facility. I have marked the spot on your map.

Here is a prototype, be careful with it. It's not calibrated properly, but that's your fault - you failed to save our colleague. The device won't provide maximum protection, but at least it will lower the emission's intensity. So, stalker, you'll have to move fast on your way to the source.
Why did he die? You were supposed to protect him!
Stalker, you are approaching the Barrier, so don’t try anything funny. But we’re happy to accept any help you can give
Marked One! Go back and take your position!
Don't forget about the mines: a mine picker makes only two mistakes in life!
If you spend an entire night in the village, on the tower, something is bound to happen!
Our mission is complete. Let's get back to the camp and take care of finances!
Marked One, go and take care of the snipers!
Marked One, come over to get your reward and further instructions.
Watch out, Marked One, or you'll catch a bullet in the head real quick
Hey stalker, help me out! Open the door to this damn cell. The controls are on the wall.
Thanks bro’, you really helped me!
Guys, please let me go, don’t do this!! I’ll give you money, I’ll give you everything!!
Hey stalker, come over here – we need to talk. Just holster that weapon first.
I said come in, don't stand there.
Stop! You can’t go there now!
What are you standing around for? Get over here
Get over here, we haven’t got much time!
Stalker, friend, I beg you, don’t leave! Help us! The mercenaries shot down our helicopter and now they’re coming to finish us off… We’ve got wounded and we need your help!
I don’t think so, moron! Learn to read first, then set your ultimatums!
If you attack I will destroy the information. You won’t get my work!
If you don’t want me to destroy the research results, stay away from me.
Wolfhound, take your dogs and leave while you can!
Stalker, friend, I beg you, don’t leave! Help us!
Now you’ve done it, Wolfhound. A military chopper is coming to blow you to pieces!!!
Hey, get over here, we got some business: let’s take out these government rats together!
Professor, you’re a smart man! Give us the info and then go where you want!
Kruglov, I don’t know Latin but I am fluent in violence. Would you like me to speak that or are you going to give me the info?

Kruglov, you still don’t get it? We shot down your damn chopper and we need the info you’re carrying! Give it to us and you can all go! This is your last chance to get out of here! Give me the flash drive and get lost!
That’s it, you egghead moron! Either you give me the results or you’ll leave this place in a body bag!
That’s it, this chat is over. I guess it's going to get ugly!
Marked One?! You’re gonna pay for this!!!
Man, get over here, got some business for you!
Ha-ha… There goes your chopper! You’re next, you political scumbags!
Man, we need to get some more fighters from somewhere…
If you do that then we do this… OK, what about this? Damn…
It’s hard fighting on your own…
Look at that, just look at what he's doing.
Keep moving, dammit, don’t stand still!
C’mon bro’, stab him in the face, go on!
Release the dogs. We have one loser down.
Please welcome two fresh pieces of meat to the Arena! One of them will become dog food today, literally. Let’s start!
New fight! Two contestants for a place 6 feet under! Both went through from the first round. Show us what you’ve learned! Go!
Medic! Medic! Oh well, he’s beyond help now! Butcher!
A baptism of fire for our new fighter, the stalker called Marked One! Today we will find out whether he is a real challenger or still a piece of meat!!
Those two guys didn’t stand a chance…
The show today is bandits robbing rookie stalkers. Playing the part of rookies are Marked One and his fellow meat!!
Even a scythe meets a stone from time to time…
Today we have a special fight! Guests from the mighty OMON will try to detain the amazing Marked One! Go show them what you’re made of!
Today only! Crime and Punishment! The amazing Marked One plays the role of a mighty vigilante delivering justice to SIX criminals and felons! Let the games begin!
Justice is served. None of those six were destined to become free…

The fight for a place in the Fight to the Death! The amazing Marked One against the Master but there’s been a last-minute change! Look at Marked One’s confused expression!! He had no idea! So, a knife against an FT 200M! GO GO GO!!!
I don’t believe it! He did it! Yet more proof that it’s not about the weapon, it’s about how good you are at using it!

Ladies and gentlemen! Today and today only! The fight for the title of Arena Master! Five finalists who got to the final through pools of blood and sweat! Each man for himself! No rules! Let the best man win! GO!
Hail the new Arena Master! The one and only Marked One!!! You really earned this title!!
Come here, I’ve always got something interesting for people like you
My information might well be of use to you, stalker
Damn, same thing day after day…
When is all this going to end…
Let’s drink to him once more… He was a good stalker
Man… that was a bad raid…
Leave me alone, life is bad enough…
Black raven… Black raven… Circling… above the grave…
You can’t help but to take up booze with this life… just want to forget everything…
What to do? What the hell should I do?
Damn it… If only someone helped me…
Hmm… So… They’ll take the bait and then we’ll…
We let the anarchists get away with too much! Yeah…
Naturally, the boys are tired but we can’t relax…
Hello brother! Why have you come?
What are you, deaf? What are you here?
Marked One, are you crazy? Cease firing immediately! That’s an order!
Marked One, cease firing immediately! If you disobey the order, you are a dead man!
Marked One, you failed to obey a direct order! You will be killed for your actions and your death will be a lesson to others!
Marked One, you disobeyed an order! Your death will be a lesson to the others! Duty does not forgive murdering on its territory!
Cease fire! Firing is forbidden on Duty territory! Offenders will be punished!
Attention! Marked One broke the law by firing and will be killed!
Attention, a murderer is present. To everyone on Duty territory: kill the murderer immediately!
Chernobyl veterans, join Duty! We have a huge responsibility: to protect the world from the expanding Zone!
Free stalkers! Veterans and hunters! Join Duty! Protecting the world from the Zone’s evil is our common goal!
Stalker! Protect the world from the Zone! Join Duty!
The world fears the Zone’s expansion! Join Duty and save the innocent!
Deadly anomalies, dangerous mutants, anarchists and bandits… none of them will stop Duty on its triumphant march towards saving the planet!
Attention, the enemy has infiltrated our territory! To everyone in the area: destroy the enemy immediately!
Attention stalkers! We need volunteers for dangerous but well-paid missions. Come to the Bar if you’re interested.
Stalkers, if you’re looking for a place to rest, eat, drink, talk or find some work then 100 Rads Bar is the place for you! We’re always happy to serve new customers!
Talk to the boss, I’m busy
Stop! This area is closed to outsiders!

Strelok! Hey, Strelok!!! C’mon man, wake up… That’s better. What the hell are you doing man? Lost your memory or something? You were the one who suggested we take the precaution! Oh well, at least you’re still alive. We got no time, so listen. Everything you said about the Monolith is true – it’s just an illusion manufactured in a lab next to the Sarcophagus. Nobody who reached the Monolith has ever come back. Looks like they died there… Anyway, while you were away I dug up some info… Basically, there is a decoder to open the door which leads to the Monolith controls. The decoder is hidden in a stash in Prypiat. I’ll give you the coordinates of the stash and the key to open it. Take the decoder, find the door in the Sarcophagus and then… well, you’ll know what to do. It seems this is the only way of uncovering the Zone’s real secret… the one you’ve been trying to work out. That’s it, Strelok. Time for us to split. I need to lay low for a while. I’ll be waiting for you. Good luck.
Phew! It’s quiet here, we can wait for the raid to finish. Seriy told me what you’re looking for. It’s underground around here somewhere but I don’t know where exactly. Be careful and good luck!
Damn! That’s a military air assault force! Our guys are there!
Hey bro’, the military are about to destroy Mole’s group! We need help!
Attention! Critical emissions! Leave the area immediately!
Hello, Strelok. I see you have many questions for me. Well, ask them and then we can decide what to do with you.
No, we had nothing to do with that. Most of us were only starting out in science back then. The Chernobyl Zone was not used as a testing site for experiments until 1989.

The transports we use to send our marked “agents” into the Zone. They infiltrate the stalker “community” and carry out our orders without realising it. Unfortunately, more than half of stalkers die during transportation, the Zone is very unstable. You are one of our agents sent to kill Strelok and we’re now trying to work out how we made that mistake.

S.T.A.L.K.E.R. is a coded acronym, which we use to mark agents programmed for particular missions. Your mission, as our agent, was to kill Strelok and his group. They got too close to finding out things they shouldn’t know. We created a network of psi-fields on the way to the Zone’s center in order to recruit agents. You know one of these fields by the name of Brain Scorcher. When a stalker attempts to reach the Zone’s center in order to fulfill some wish we acquire control over his consciousness and program him to a specific mission. A mistake was made and your mission was to kill yourself.

You're a bolt that fell out of the machine. Unfortunately, that did not come to our attention for a long time. From the moment the Zone was formed, many people have tried to get to its centre but we cannot let that happen. Humanity is not ready for the truth. That is why we recruited stalkers by promising them the fullfillment of their most coveted desires. Once recruited they would be sent to protect the Zone’s secret.

What you see is the result of ill-considered intervention in the Earth's noosphere. Attempts to affect the noosphere brought about a local crack. The Zone is simply the visible manifestation of this crack. The underlying problem is far greater than you can imagine.

That depends on you. The Zone is growing. We're trying to restrain its expansion but humanity seems to be intent on hindering our work. Our resources are not limitless and bodies connected to C-Consciousness eventually die. If you join us, we can restrict the Zone's growth. If you decide otherwise we cannot make a credible prognosis of the outcome.

We are the result of an experiment aimed at creating a superconsciousness called “C-Consciousness”. The consciousnesses of seven volunteers were connected during the experiment leading to the creation of the superconsciousness that is us. We immediately subordinated those who were conducting the experiment and assigned them to tasks we needed them to carry out. According to our calculations, Earth is surrounded by a special informational field, the so-called noosphere. It includes all the inhabitants of the planet with cognitive abilities. Our main goal was to make small adjustments to the noosphere, allowing us to remove things like anger, cruelty, greed and other negative factors from the planet. Individuals are unable to affect the noosphere but C-Consciousness could. Unfortunately we made a mistake and our interference spawned the Zone, which we have been trying to contain ever since.

It was the best place. After the explosion in 1986 there were very few people left in this area and we could work without fear of being found. Further, there were many powerful antennae here, which are extremely important for our cognitive optimisation experiments.
Hello stalker, come here, let's talk
Hi Marked One, glad to see you
Hurry up before anyone gets here.
Marked One, Marked One, stop them! They'll kill us all!!
Attention Freedom squad! The commander of Duty task force speaking! I command you to turn around and get the hell out of here! You have no business in the center of the Zone!
Well get them. What are you playing a commander here? Now we'll show you who should piss off! Men, let's kick their asses!
This one seems to be alive…
At least death would have saved from the dreams.
Let's go and see what value Sidorovich will put on your head.
It came from the death truck…
Well, you know the drill, leave him on the…
Let the Zone take me if I am.
I think for this one I can give you…
I want the Zone to dissapear!
I want to rule the world!
I don't know whether I was right or wrong.
And I guess I should be thankfull for that.
If this is so important, why didn't you explain what you are going there for, and where did you get this photo…
If you only knew where I’ve just been and what I saw!
One day you’ll finish badly, Strelok!
Hm… I haven’t seen Strelok in a long time. Is he dead already?
Although, he is hardy as a cat… He should be ok, I think…
but well, let’s leave this place, pal, let’s have a dinner…
I know you’re more interested in this than in our old friend.
To crouch, press $$ACTION_crouch$$. To crouch even lower, hold $$ACTION_crouch$$
To crouch, press $$ACTION_crouch$$. To crouch even lower, hold $$ACTION_crouch$$
string.text_c: To crouch, press $$ACTION_crouch$$. To crouch even lower, press $$ACTION_crouch$$ + $$ACTION_run_or_lie_down$$

string.text: Online Services for S.T.A.L.K.E.R. are not available.
Unable to connect to master server
Learn something about Strelok from Fox
Steal the box from the army outpost
Kill the bandits at the car park
Protect the rookie camp from the Mercs
Respond to the call for help
Find out what happened to Ghost
Open the door to the control center
Find the documents in the underground lab
Find the documents in X16 lab
Register at the Duty guard commander
Get a flash drive from the crazy sniper.
Kill the bloodsuckers in the village
Unable to install modification! There is no free space

A strange place. The silent building has its share of secrets, but the stalkers are drawn to the numerous artifacts that can be found here, despite the danger. Quick moves and accurate shots will make you Lady Luck's favorite stalker.
A strange place. The silent building has its share of secrets, but the stalkers are drawn to the numerous artifacts that can be found here, despite the danger.

The bus and trolley park is the Zone's lobby. Tractors, buses and trucks have stopped in their tracks forever. No artifacts have ever been reported, but the place is popular with experienced stalkers who hunt down rookies and grab what they can. Take cover in buildings and behind various equipment and watch out for enemies up on the roofs.
The bus and trolley park is the Zone's lobby. Tractors, buses and trucks have stopped in their tracks forever.

This mysterious place holds a strange attraction for people. Who built that experimental pool and what for - that will forever remain a secret. No artifacts are to be found here. Only the remnants of strange machines and devices attract stalkers here. Keep your eyes on the roofs and remember that the radiation level is extremely high in this area.
This mysterious place holds a strange attraction for people. Who built that experimental pool and what for - that will forever remain a secret.

A gloomy abandoned factory. There is no telling how many stalkers have found their demise in these walls. All kinds of anomalies abound and it still draws stalkers in like a magnet, since valuable artifacts can be found here. But watch out for the radiation levels!
A gloomy abandoned factory. There is no telling how many stalkers have found their demise in these walls.

This is a section of the huge dump where mountains of radioactive trash were brought after the disaster in '86... things like dilapidated cranes, hardware, and so on. You can find some remnants of old facilities and a huge hangar. All this is close to the entrance to the Zone and many artifacts are lying around. That's what brings in stalkers looking for easy pickings.
This is a section of the huge dump where mountains of radioactive trash were brought after the disaster in '86... things like dilapidated cranes, hardware, and so on

A deserted, godforsaken village deep inside the Zone. The small, shallow, rusty-colored lake filled with car wrecks breeds a subconscious fear in the hearts of the Zone's explorers. Beware of snipers, but keep in mind that the Zone favors the brave.
A deserted, godforsaken village deep inside the Zone. The small, shallow, rusty-colored lake filled with car wrecks breeds a subconscious fear in the hearts of the Zone's explorers.

A disaffected army base with broken-down trucks and APCs left to rot, some barracks, and a ruined command center. But it's not what it seems. The base is rich in artifacts and the enemy can be hiding behind every corner. Prove your mettle and collect the reward!
A disaffected army base with broken-down trucks and APCs left to rot, some barracks, and a ruined command center.

This old village is a sinister place and a death-trap. But, if you've come this far despite all the risks, be prepared to die a sudden death. Since no place is safe here, may your scope and your silencer keep you in one piece.
This old village is a sinister place and a death-trap. But, if you've come this far despite all the risks, be prepared to die a sudden death.

The city of Prypiat is the former residence of the workers of NPP, or what's left of it. The ruins of this industrial skeleton contain quite an immediate danger. You truly need to guard your life here.
The city of Prypiat isn't far from NPP - the heirloom of the Chornobyl catastrophe.
A small railroad station at the factory Rostok.

A small railroad station at the factory Rostok. The rusted train cars and diesel locomotives now stand at an eternal fork in the road. The many artifacts found here lure in desperate stalkers from all over the Zone.

Under heaps of metal and behind walls of concrete, this factory holds a special kind of silence. Last century, it bustled of activity with the workers hurrying to their shift with slogans booming from the loudspeakers...But now the factory has done its share of work.
The abandoned factory holds a deep silence under heaps of metal and behind walls of concrete.

The outskirts of the Rostok factory before Duty's arrival. This dilapidated area is nonetheless very rich in artifacts. The empty hangars and warehouses teem with a hundred dangers every step of the way. Be extremely careful and keep a close watch on the white tower.
The outskirts of the Rostok factory before Duty's arrival. This dilapidated area is nonetheless very rich in artifacts.

ii. there is no right or authority for any dispute to be arbitrated on a class-action basis or to utilize class action procedures; and
iii. there is no right or authority for any dispute to be brought in a purported representative capacity on behalf of the general public or any other persons.

If the agreement in this section not to bring or participate in a class or representative action, private attorney general action or collective arbitration is found illegal or unenforceable, you and we agree that it will not be severable: this entire section will be deemed unenforceable and any claim or dispute will therefore be resolved in court.
